---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement for AppShelfKit
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem would this solve for developers using AppShelfKit?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the API or behavior you would like.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Scope Check

- [ ] This keeps remote loading optional.
- [ ] This keeps the package lightweight.
- [ ] This avoids unofficial App Store APIs.
- [ ] This works across iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and visionOS or explains why not.
